scripts.prisma:generate: sh -lc 'if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; fi; pnpm exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: sh -lc 'if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; fi; pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.prisma:studio: sh -lc 'if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; fi; pnpm exec prisma studio --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.prisma:db:push: sh -lc 'if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a && . ../../.env && set +a; fi; pnpm exec prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
